rows.content: LINE+- This is the most intelligent of the compares. It reports                                        as
inserts and deletes on a line by line basis.
BYTE+- This is most useful in comparing binary or non-record oriented
files. The files are compared byte by byte and the report
provides differences in a hexidecimal dump format with a
summary. When BYTE is specified, the PROFILE fields are ignored.
This specifies the form for the output listing of the report.
OVSUM+- This form provides an overall summary of differences without a
detail level report. When COMPARE TYPE = FILE is set, OVSUM is
DELTA+- This form provides differences only in the detail level of the
